human_gates.title: Fixture UI
human_gates.hard_ceiling: Fixture/fake-backed Flutter and pure layers only; no process, filesystem, database, credential, network, runtime, or external effect.

human_gates.title: Contained local DRY runtime
human_gates.hard_ceiling: Contained local and DRY behavior only; no remote mutation, merge, release, or submission.

human_gates.title: One controlled LIVE canary
human_gates.hard_ceiling: One exact sandbox target/effect envelope, one use by default, expiry required, and hold-only merge posture unless separately admitted.

human_gates.title: Release candidate
human_gates.hard_ceiling: System audit, packaging, authorized signing/notarization, and demo evidence; no tag, upload, or submission.

human_gates.title: Hackathon submission
human_gates.hard_ceiling: Only the exact candidate artifact and claims bound by the human receipt may be tagged or submitted.

packages.title: Governance bootstrap
packages.acceptance: Sol route, fresh Opus, Fable scope, same-owner rework, worktree isolation, and PM coordination are proven; no product artifact.

packages.title: Dependency provenance and import boundary
packages.acceptance: Exact substrate and public-devloop commits, binaries, exports, closure, observe/host facts, licenses, and graph/import allowlist are reproducible; reference packages remain absent.

packages.title: Workflow and Council executable contract kernel
packages.acceptance: Dart/Lua canonical bytes and digests agree; Workflow and Council stay app-owned; assignments, bounds, hostile cases, evidence fields, and worktree-portable fixtures pass. R-059 intentionally remains outside the RUN family.

packages.title: Context, authority, effects, and managed-clone contracts
packages.acceptance: Dual GitHub auth, sanitized personal Codex use, label-only claim, public-devloop maps, Council boundary, DRY/LIVE matrix, and non-user-checkout clone rules are exact; no reference authority.

packages.title: Public-devloop required and optional seams
packages.acceptance: Visibility, immutable evidence, and restart/replay public APIs land and pin with exact receipts; merge is either a tested public seam or explicitly hold-only; no app-local substitute.

packages.title: Substrate containment, Codex, topology, and lifetime
packages.acceptance: Six-root confinement, managed-Git broker, content-only Codex grant, safe personal-account invocation, root topology, outer-job zero-survivor receipts, final build SHA, and hostile probes pass.

packages.title: Compatibility disposition and app-loop manifest
packages.acceptance: Compatibility/family/config/filesystem/lifetime/evidence schemas and restart disposition integrate once; the app-loop manifest contains only substrate, public devloop, and declared closure.

packages.title: Minimal proof package, consumers, evidence, and lints
packages.acceptance: The minimal no-product package loads Workflow/Council, emits bound receipts/evidence, publishes safely, passes cross-language parity, and rejects every prohibited graph/import.

packages.title: Executable host and effect seam probes
packages.acceptance: Direct host, sanitized actors, intake, Council/Codex, managed clone/Git/PR, review/restart/evidence, containment, and the full DRY/LIVE effect matrix pass with typed receipts.

packages.title: Step-0 integrated proof and independent readiness audit
packages.acceptance: Read-only-root proof is green; the dossier is complete; Fable architecture advice is dispositioned; fresh Opus has no unresolved P0/P1; R-039 truthfully closes Step 0 without itself granting a human tier.

packages.title: Fixture-only Flutter shell and layer architecture
packages.acceptance: Desktop scaffold, presentation/application/domain/infrastructure lint, theme, navigation, complete state primitives, provenance UI, and accessibility harness pass with fixtures only and no process/filesystem/network effect.

packages.title: Setup, Doctor, Runtime, recovery, and Settings galleries
packages.acceptance: Fixture galleries cover every acquisition, mutation, lifecycle, and recovery state with accessible responsive controls and no adapter import or live effect.

packages.title: Workflow and Council galleries
packages.acceptance: Catalog, Workflow authoring, Council authoring, and Council-run fixtures render only frozen supported fields, evidence, bounds, assignments, and terminal states.

packages.title: Work, Overview, Fleet galleries and fixture router
packages.acceptance: List, board, detail, overview, and fleet state galleries pass; U-011 alone integrates fixture routes and goldens with no production wiring.

packages.title: Domain ports and application primitives
packages.acceptance: All eight port families and typed result, command, cancellation, and freshness primitives are immutable, exhaustive, dependency-free, and tested with fakes.

packages.title: Process, path, tool, and actor infrastructure
packages.acceptance: Canonical paths, bounded argv execution, redaction, typed Doctor registry, separate GitHub actors, git, and sanitized Codex checks pass without global account switching or secret retention.

packages.title: Persistence, audit, CAS, and recovery infrastructure
packages.acceptance: Isolated SQLite, cache, connection/preferences, staged drafts, append-only audit, backup-first recovery, and generic CAS services pass migration, corruption, and conflict tests.

packages.title: Dependency admission and source adapters
packages.acceptance: Compatibility admission and dependency Doctor checks bind exact manifests; substrate, bounded GitHub reads, git facts, and managed-tree adapters conform to ports with no reference imports.

packages.title: Trusted evidence projections and atomic snapshots
packages.acceptance: Trusted evidence parsing, pure Workflow/Council/runtime projections, fair acquisition, isolated rate budgets, and atomic snapshot generations preserve truth, qualification, staleness, and completeness.

packages.title: Production Workflow and Council orchestration
packages.acceptance: Bounded app-owned Workflow and deterministic Council/review evidence execute through public devloop and substrate only; no copied loop or consensus authority.

packages.title: Managed implementation-to-PR runtime
packages.acceptance: Public worktree, Git, and PR seams plus substrate Codex invocation form a receipted, idempotent implementation-to-PR module under frozen grants; T2 tests use local/no-remote-effect fakes.

packages.title: Review, exact-head gate, terminal, and loop graph
packages.acceptance: Review, gate, and terminal runtime is exhaustive; merge exists only if R-053 admitted; L-011 alone integrates the manifest, entrypoint, and event graph.

packages.title: Direct host, config receipts, lifecycle, and recovery
packages.acceptance: Direct/runtime receipts, catalog, containment and outer launcher, host composition, immutable snapshot, lifecycle, effect guard, reconciliation, replay, and headless integration pass zero-survivor and no-escape tests.

packages.title: Application use cases
packages.acceptance: Setup, definitions, work, runtime, guarded write, fleet/recovery/settings, Council evidence, and overview behavior pass exhaustive port-fake tests with no infrastructure import.

packages.title: Readiness, onboarding, Runtime, and Settings UI
packages.acceptance: Fake-backed ViewModels and views cover Doctor/setup/runtime/settings states, remediation, launch review, cleanupFailed, and accessible controls through application use cases only.

packages.title: Workflow and Council product UI
packages.acceptance: Catalog, detail, authoring, activation, Council definition, and Council evidence UI expose exactly the frozen contracts and states, with no prompt/model/score inventions.

packages.title: Work and Overview product UI
packages.acceptance: Canonical list, board, detail, and overview membership/evidence remain qualified, actionable, fresh, and consistent; no decorative or inferred KPI.

packages.title: Guarded human writes, audit, and diagnostics
packages.acceptance: Narrow issue/comment/reconcile effects require explicit guards and confirmation, ambiguity never auto-retries, bodies/secrets are not retained, and redacted audit/export is complete; T2 exercises only default-deny and no-remote-effect paths.

packages.title: Fleet, recovery, data hardening, and full-suite CI
packages.acceptance: Five connections isolate failures/rate state; fleet/recovery UI is typed and accessible; source/data hostile cases pass visible resource and privacy budgets. This package is mandatory for full-product and any unrescoped full-app submission claim.

packages.title: Hackathon composition and core CI
packages.acceptance: One production router/composition root binds every admitted port without locator or fake; core, adapter/runtime, product UI, write, fleet, security, and performance CI are deterministic. A narrower deadline slice requires an explicit human RESCOPE and separate claim set.

packages.title: Deterministic DRY vertical slice
packages.acceptance: The full fixture loop and admitted DRY evidence flow pass across every shipped Hackathon view with remote effects disabled and zero unexpected mutation.

packages.title: Adversarial lifecycle, auth/effect, and UX drills
packages.acceptance: Lifetime, authentication/write/effect, accessibility, responsive, and performance drills pass in isolated fixtures; AP-28 source/fleet/data/recovery evidence is integrated; no live target is touched.

packages.title: Allowlisted controlled-live sandbox matrix
packages.acceptance: Only human-approved exact repositories, issues, actors, branches, and effects run happy/hostile LIVE cases; ambiguity holds; merge remains absent unless admitted and explicitly authorized; every effect has provenance and a receipt.

packages.title: System dossier, Fable advice, Opus audit, and acceptance
packages.acceptance: The submission-scope evidence dossier links every claimed requirement; Fable advice is dispositioned; fresh Opus has no unresolved P0/P1; E-012 records mechanical system acceptance without widening the human tier.

packages.title: macOS packaging, notarization, release audit, and decision
packages.acceptance: The artifact builds from a Finder-clean environment, is signed/notarized/stapled when distributed, has licenses/SBOM/install/recovery docs, passes final security/lifecycle scan, Fable advice, fresh Opus audit, and an exact claim-to-evidence check; HG-05 alone authorizes submission.

deadline_submission_slice.claim_ceiling: A truthful working Workflow/Council fixture demonstration only; never the complete runtime-connected full-app/v2 product.
deadline_submission_slice.rule: The PM may prepare a dossier, but no package dependency or requirement is silently removed. A human RESCOPE receipt must name the exact included requirements, omitted claims, artifact, demo, and remaining full-product backlog before a narrower submission path is dispatched or represented as complete.
